words.def: only one
words.example: He sent her a single red rose.

words.def: used as a polite way of addressing a man whose name you do not know, for example in a shop or restaurant
words.example: Good morning, sir. Can I help you?

words.def: a place where a building, town, etc. was, is or will be located
words.example: the site of a sixteenth-century abbey

words.def: all the circumstances and things that are happening at a particular time and in a particular place
words.example: the present economic/financial/political situation

words.def: how large or small a person or thing is
words.example: population/sample/group/class size

words.def: connected with the sport of skiing
words.example: a ski resort

words.def: the sport or activity of moving over snow on skis
words.example: He also enjoys skiing and mountain biking.

words.def: the space above the earth that you can see when you look up, where clouds and the sun, moon and stars appear
words.example: The sky suddenly went dark and it started to rain.

words.def: at a slow speed; not quickly
words.example: to move/walk/turn slowly

words.def: a mobile phone that also has some of the functions of a computer, for example the facility to use apps and the internet
words.example: You can use your smartphone to access the internet.

words.def: the quality of something that people and animals sense through their noses
words.example: a sweet/pleasant smell

words.def: the expression that you have on your face when you are happy or you think something is funny, in which the corners of your mouth turn upwards
words.example: a broad/warm/bright/slight smile

words.def: the grey, white or black gas that is produced by something burning
words.example: cigarette/tobacco smoke

words.def: the activity or habit of smoking cigarettes, etc.
words.example: No Smoking (= for example, on a notice)

words.def: to such a great degree
words.example: Don't look so angry.

words.def: a substance that you use with water for washing your body
words.example: Wash the affected area with soap and water.

words.def: a game played by two teams of 11 players, using a round ball which players kick up and down the playing field. Teams try to kick the ball into the other team’s goal.
words.example: I played soccer when I was younger.

words.def: connected with activities in which people meet each other for pleasure
words.example: She has a busy social life.

words.def: people in general, living together in communities
words.example: She believes that the arts benefit society as a whole.

words.def: a piece of clothing that is worn over the foot, ankle and lower part of the leg, especially inside a shoe
words.example: a pair of socks

words.def: changing shape easily when pressed; not stiff or hard
words.example: soft margarine

words.def: a member of an army, especially one who is not an officer
words.example: They visited the graves of US soldiers killed in the First World War.

words.def: a way of solving a problem or dealing with a difficult situation
words.example: Attempts to find a solution have failed.

words.def: to find a way of dealing with a problem or difficult situation
words.example: Attempts are being made to solve the problem of waste disposal.

words.def: a person who is not known or mentioned by name
words.example: Somebody should have told me.

words.def: in, at or to a place that you do not know or do not mention by name
words.example: I read somewhere that she refuses to do interviews.

words.def: a place, person or thing that you get something from
words.example: renewable energy sources

words.def: in or towards the south
words.example: South Wales

words.def: the area outside the earth’s atmosphere where all the other planets and stars are
words.example: in space, Valentina Tereshkova was the first woman in space.

words.def: a person who gives a talk or makes a speech
words.example: He was a guest speaker at the conference.

words.def: connected with one particular thing only
words.example: specific needs/requirements

words.def: a formal talk that a person gives to an audience
words.example: Several people made speeches at the wedding.

words.def: a tool that has a handle with a shallow bowl at the end, used for mixing, serving and eating food
words.example: a plastic/metal spoon

words.def: having four straight equal sides and four angles of 90°
words.example: a square room

words.def: a set of steps built between two floors inside a building
words.example: We had to carry the piano up three flights of stairs.

words.def: a small piece of paper with a design on it that you buy and stick on an envelope or a package before you post it
words.example: a 67p stamp

words.def: a large ball of burning gas in space that we see as a point of light in the sky at night
words.example: There was a big moon and hundreds of stars were shining overhead.

words.def: the point at which something begins
words.example: If we don't hurry, we'll miss the start.

words.def: something that you say or write that gives information or an opinion
words.example: Are the following statements true or false?

words.def: to take something from a person, shop, etc. without permission and without intending to return it or pay for it
words.example: I'll report you to the police if I catch you stealing again.

words.def: the organ inside the body where food goes when you eat it
words.example: stomach pains/cramps

words.def: a hard solid mineral substance that is found in the ground, often used for building
words.example: Most of the houses are built of stone.

words.def: very bad weather with strong winds and rain, and often thunder and lightning
words.example: fierce/heavy/severe/violent storms

words.def: without a bend or curve; going in one direction only
words.example: a straight road

words.def: unusual or surprising, especially in a way that is difficult to understand
words.example: A strange thing happened this morning.

words.def: a plan that is intended to achieve a particular purpose
words.example: the government’s economic strategy

words.def: the activity of learning or gaining knowledge, either from books or by examining things in the world
words.example: a room set aside for private study

words.def: the particular way in which something is done
words.example: a wide range of musical styles

words.def: to achieve something that you have been trying to do or get; to have the result or effect that was intended
words.example: Our plan succeeded.

words.def: the fact that you have achieved something that you want and have been trying to do or get
words.example: The company has achieved considerable success in this market.

words.def: achieving your aims or what was intended
words.example: The experiment was entirely successful.

words.def: used to emphasize the great degree of something
words.example: This issue was of such importance that we could not afford to ignore it.

words.def: to put forward an idea or a plan for other people to think about
words.example: suggest something, I'd like to suggest a different explanation for the company's decline.

words.def: an idea or a plan that you mention for somebody else to think about
words.example: Can I make a suggestion?

words.def: approval that you give to somebody/something because you want them to be successful
words.example: support for something, There is strong public support for the policy.

words.def: confident that you know something or that you are right
words.example: ‘Is that John over there?’ ‘I'm not sure’.

words.def: an event, a piece of news, etc. that is unexpected or that happens suddenly
words.example: What a nice surprise!

words.def: feeling or showing surprise
words.example: a surprised look

words.def: causing surprise
words.example: It’s not surprising (that) they lost.

words.def: a piece of clothing for the upper part of the body, made of wool or cotton, with long sleeves
words.example: She wore jeans and a sweater.

words.def: containing, or tasting as if it contains, a lot of sugar
words.example: a cup of hot sweet tea

words.def: a person, an object, an event, etc. that represents a more general quality or situation
words.example: The vase is decorated with religious symbols.

words.def: an organized set of ideas or theories or a particular way of doing something
words.example: reform of the country's education system

words.def: a piece of work that somebody has to do, especially a hard or unpleasant one
words.example: to accomplish/perform/undertake/complete a task

words.def: scientific knowledge used in practical ways in industry, for example in designing new machines
words.example: science and technology

words.def: between 13 and 19 years old; connected with people of this age
words.example: a teenage girl/boy

words.def: a person who is between 13 and 19 years old
words.example: a magazine aimed at teenagers

words.def: the measurement in degrees of how hot or cold a thing or place is
words.example: high/low temperatures

words.def: any form of written material
words.example: a computer that can process text

words.def: used when people or animals performing an action are also affected by it
words.example: They seemed to be enjoying themselves.

words.def: having a larger distance between opposite sides or surfaces than other similar objects or than normal
words.example: a thick slice of bread

words.def: a person who steals something from another person or place
words.example: a car/jewel thief

words.def: having a smaller distance between opposite sides or surfaces than other similar objects or than normal
words.example: Cut the vegetables into thin strips.

words.def: the process of thinking about something
words.example: I had to do some quick thinking.

words.def: each of three equal parts of something
words.example: He divided the money into thirds.

words.def: needing or wanting to drink
words.example: We were hungry and thirsty.

words.def: something that you think of or remember
words.example: thought of doing something, I couldn't bear the thought of waiting any longer.
There were thousands of people there.

words.def: to send something from your hand through the air by moving your hand or arm quickly
words.example: Practise throwing and catching.

words.def: arranged neatly and with everything in order
words.example: a tidy desk

words.def: a long, narrow piece of cloth worn around the neck, especially by men, with a knot in front
words.example: He was dressed impeccably in a suit and tie.

words.def: an instrument such as a hammer, screwdriver, saw, etc. that you hold in your hand and use for making things, repairing things, etc.
words.example: garden tools

words.def: a person who is travelling or visiting a place for pleasure
words.example: busloads of foreign tourists
